failure_reason: Official API returned no-key response; automated use requires TROVE_API_KEY.
retry_condition: TROVE_API_KEY is present in the environment.
next_action: Wait for supplied API key or use manually exported article records.

failure_reason: Public probes produced bot checks, 404s, or unstable text renditions.
retry_condition: Documented public endpoint becomes available, article export supplied manually, or TROVE_API_KEY is present.
next_action: Do not probe alternative unauthenticated article text URLs.

source_name: OpenAlex and Crossref current query set
failure_reason: Current term set produced little or no net-new substantive public narrative material.
retry_condition: Query design materially changes, new vocabulary is supplied, or a specific scholarly target list is produced.

failure_reason: Broad archive/sitemap candidates are overwhelmingly already present or duplicates.
retry_condition: Specific missing AYR records or source-chain enrichment targets are supplied.
next_action: Use only for verification, source-chain enrichment, or specific modern witness pages.

failure_reason: Full-site scans produced navigation, contact, charter, FAQ, and generic spirit false positives.
retry_condition: Source-specific collection/history/archive paths are identified and a small probe shows acceptable yield.
next_action: Replace broad scans with section-specific probes.

failure_reason: Broad ghost searches produced non-Australian and literary-period Victorian false positives.
retry_condition: Title-specific or collection-specific Australian queries are configured.
next_action: Use only item-level Australian relationship filters and public OCR verification.

failure_reason: Tourism pages reduce corpus credibility when used as primary evidence.
retry_condition: A tourism page supplies a source citation to an archive, newspaper, book, institution, or authoritative heritage page.
next_action: Use only for discovery and source-chain tracing.

retry_condition: More source sections or corroborating institutional/newspaper sources are identified.
next_action: Use as a model for section-specific, source-verified institutional seeds.
